message:
refactor(lean): simplify obligation stability proof tactics

Replace verbose Eq.trans (Eq.symm ...) patterns with more idiomatic
simpa/trans/symm composition across obligation stability theorems
(committed_obligation_stable, aborted_obligation_stable,
leaked_obligation_stable) and setTask_same_region_preserves_wellformed.

10 instances of `exact Eq.trans (Eq.symm hOb') hOb` replaced with
`simpa using (hOb'.trans hOb.symm)` — semantically identical but
more readable and less fragile under Lean tactic changes. One instance
of `by simpa using h.symm` simplified to `by simpa using h` where
the symmetry was unnecessary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2377,7 +2377,7 @@ private theorem setTask_same_region_preserves_wellformed_aux {Value Error Panic
       by_cases hEq : t' = t
       · subst t'
         simp [getTask, setTask] at h
-        have hTaskEq : task' = newTask := by simpa using h.symm
+        have hTaskEq : task' = newTask := by simpa using h
         subst task'
         obtain ⟨region, hReg⟩ := hWF.task_region_exists t task hTask
         exact ⟨region, by simpa [getRegion, setTask, hSameRegion] using hReg⟩
@@ -2518,7 +2518,7 @@ theorem committed_obligation_stable {Value Error Panic : Type}
     · subst hEq
       have hEqOb : obStep = ob := by
         have : some obStep = some ob := by
-          exact Eq.trans (Eq.symm hOb') hOb
+          simpa using (hOb'.trans hOb.symm)
         exact Option.some.inj this
       rw [hEqOb] at hState
       rw [hCommitted] at hState
@@ -2531,7 +2531,7 @@ theorem committed_obligation_stable {Value Error Panic : Type}

       rw [hCommitted] at hState

       rw [hCommitted] at hState

       rw [hAborted] at hState

         exact Option.some.inj this
       rw [hEqOb] at hState
       rw [hAborted] at hState
